Title: nebula-mesh: POST /api/v1/hosts/{id}/mobile-bundle response lacks Cache-Control: no-store
Description: `internal/api/mobile_bundle.go:62-66` sets only `Content-Type: application/yaml`. The Web-UI sibling at `internal/web/handlers.go:1316-1321` sets `Cache-Control: no-store`, `Pragma: no-cache`, `Expires: 0`, `X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff` — and has a test asserting it. The API path was missed.
